full_text:
Xun Xu (Gongzeng) 荀勗 (公曾)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xun Xu (荀勗), styledGongzeng (公曾). Great-grandson of Xun Shuang. Warned against Zhong Hui and opposed the Invasion of Wu. Xun Xu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Xun Xu lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
